# Majestic Million - Data Agreement

## Provider
Majestic-12 Ltd.

## URL
https://majestic.com/reports/majestic-million

## Terms of Service URL
https://majestic.com/terms

## License
Free download with attribution (proprietary license, free tier)

## Data We Collect
Majestic Million top 1M domains list including Trust Flow, Citation Flow, and domain ranking. Downloaded as CSV from the public Majestic Million page.

## How We Use It
Domain authority and link-trust signals in DRM3's internet telemetry index. Majestic's Trust Flow and Citation Flow scores are used alongside other ranking sources to build composite domain reputation profiles.

## Commercial Use
Yes, with attribution. The Majestic Million dataset is provided free for commercial and non-commercial use, provided attribution is given. This is distinct from their full API (which requires a paid subscription).

## Redistribution
Limited. We may display Majestic Million data as part of enriched domain profiles. We should not serve the raw Majestic Million CSV as a standalone download or build a product whose primary value is the Majestic ranking data itself.

## Attribution Required
Yes. Must credit Majestic as the data source. Recommended format: "Domain ranking data from Majestic" with a link to https://majestic.com/.

## Rate Limits
No API rate limits for the Majestic Million download (static CSV file). The full Majestic API (paid) has per-plan rate limits, but we use only the free Million dataset.

## Key Restrictions
- Must provide attribution
- Cannot misrepresent the data as our own
- Cannot use the Majestic trademark to imply endorsement
- The full API (beyond the Million list) requires a paid subscription
- Cannot redistribute the raw dataset as a standalone product

## Last Reviewed
2026-04-02
